description: Hooks this skill wants installed. Data only — an installer (landing separately) splices these into the harness hook config; the skill itself never edits settings.

hooks.description: After an Edit/Write to a tracked workspace file, group and commit pending workspace changes by category. The installer is expected to gate this on workspace-owned paths (tasks/, memory/, plans/, config/, scripts/, agents/) so edits inside repos/worktrees never trigger a commit.
At session end, flush any remaining uncommitted workspace changes.
